evidence: Merged to main (commit ab03d512, merge commit follows). Original implementation left 2 STORY-010 citations in cli.test.ts unaddressed (misread scope as FEAT/TASK/FGAP-only when the meaning-table also covered STORY-NNN) and was missing the required CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry -- both found and fixed by the orchestrator before merge, verified via direct grep and the full 5-component gate (build/check/test/check-changelog/parity-check/check-config-schema) all independently run and passing. Independently re-verified post-merge on main: cli.ts shows zero citation-pattern hits; cli.test.ts shows 12 hits, all confirmed to be the meaning-table's own known fixture-data exclusions (literal seeded TASK-001/FGAP-001/FGAP-999/TASK-002 JSON payloads and a bare 'FGAP-' prefix string), not real citations.

criteria_results.criterion: Every internal-tracker-ID citation found in the package is replaced with plain-English prose stating the same substantive point, grounded in recovered meaning.
criteria_results.evidence: All 34 unique IDs (including STORY-007/010/013) rewritten per analysis/2026-07-10-fgap-136-pi-context-cli-meaning-table.md; the STORY-010 gap found and closed by the orchestrator before this closure.

criteria_results.criterion: Zero remaining instances of the target IDs in source and test files.
criteria_results.evidence: Orchestrator's own independent grep on merged main confirms zero real citations; remaining hits are fixture data explicitly excluded by the meaning-table.

criteria_results.criterion: npm run build + npm run check + npm test exit 0, plus check-changelog/parity-check/check-config-schema.
criteria_results.evidence: All 5 gate components independently run and confirmed passing by the orchestrator; the CHANGELOG entry the original commit was missing was added before this closure.
